zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Scrope於1476年出生在英國英格蘭時，她的父親Sir Richard le Scrope34歲，母親Lady Alianor de Washbourne27歲。她和William Kingston至少有4個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1548年8月15日在澳洲塔斯曼尼亞霍巴特聖 馬也斯 亞德享年72歲，埋葬在英國艾可利頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Scrope于1476年出生在英国英格兰时，她的父亲Sir Richard le Scrope34岁，母亲Lady Alianor de Washbourne27岁。她和William Kingston至少有4个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1548年8月15日在澳大利亚塔斯曼尼亞霍巴特聖 馬也斯 亞德享年72岁，埋葬在英国艾可利頓。

nameMeanings.name: Scrope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: of uncertain origin. Tengvik suggests derivation from the Old Scandinavian personal name Skrópi (of doubtful etymology, but compare Old Scandinavian skrópa-maðr ‘hypocrite’, containing the genitive plural form of skrópar ‘sham, hypocrisy’). It is possible, but not certain, that this personal name forms the first element of the Notts place-name Scrooby. Otherwise there is no evidence for its currency in England or, more relevantly, in Normandy. Richards Castle (in Herefs and Shrops) was apparently named after Richard Scrope, who held estates in Herefs and Worcs in 1066 and was a Norman favourite of Edward the Confessor. The Scrope family, whose name is traditionally pronounced /skru:p/, was politically important in medieval England, and acquired estates in Lincs (Barton on Humber), NR Yorks (Castle Bolton), and in ER Yorks (Flotmanby). Richard (le) Scrope of Bolton, in Wensleydale, was Lord Chancellor in the reign of Richard II. The use of le and de in the surname, suggesting either a nickname or a locative name, must be treated with caution because these were often added gratuitously to Anglo-Norman surnames as a sign of high social status.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Scrope was born in 1476, in England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Richard le Scrope, was 34 and her mother, Lady Alianor de Washbourne, was 27. She had at least 4 sons and 4 daughters with William Kingston. She died on 15 August 1548, in St Mary's Churchyard, Hobart, Tasmania, Australia, at the age of 72, and was buried in Leyton, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Scrope est née en 1476, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard le Scrope, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Lady Alianor de Washbourne, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles avec William Kingston. Elle est décédée le 15 août 1548, à St Mary's Churchyard, Hobart, Tasmania, Australie, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterrée à Leyton, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Scrope 1476 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard le Scrope 34 und ihre Mutter Lady Alianor de Washbourne 27. Sie hatte mit William Kingston mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. August 1548 im Alter von 72 Jahren in St Mary's Churchyard, Hobart, Tasmania, Australien und wurde in Leyton, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Scrope è nata il nel 1476 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Richard le Scrope, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Lady Alianor de Washbourne, aveva 27 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie con William Kingston. Morì il 15 agosto 1548, nel St Mary's Churchyard, Hobart, Tasmania, Australia, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolta a Leyton, Essex, England.

ko.Leyton, Borough of Waltham Forest, Great: 오스트레일리아 타스먼이아 홉아르트 스트 마이'스 c후르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Scrope(이)가 1476년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard le Scrope(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alianor de Washbourne(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 William Kingston(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1548년 8월 15일 오스트레일리아 타스먼이아 홉아르트 스트 마이'스 c후르c히아어드에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 리턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Scrope nasceu em 1476, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard le Scrope, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alianor de Washbourne, tinha 27 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas com William Kingston. Ela faleceu em 15 de agosto de 1548, em St Mary's Churchyard, Hobart, Tasmania, Austrália, com 72 anos, e foi sepultada em Leyton, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.Leyton, Borough of Waltham Forest, Great: ст мэри'с чурчярд, хобарт, тасманя, Австралия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Scrope родилась в 1476 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Richard le Scrope было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Alianor de Washbourne, 27. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери от William Kingston. Она умерла 15 августа 1548 г. в местности ст мэри'с чурчярд, хобарт, тасманя, Австралия в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности литон, эссекс, Англия.
